_meta.label: Phoenix Directive
_meta.summary: Active TLA participant that regularly adds bribes to TLA pools. Associated with Phoenix Foundation / chain stewardship post-TFL. A significant bribe source in TLA vote markets.

facts.claim: Phoenix Directive regularly adds bribes (vote incentives) to TLA pools, making it a notable participant in TLA's vote market. Bribes attract votes toward specific pools each epoch.
facts.notes: Role stated in our curated protocols.json. A primary-source writeup (who runs it, how formed) is still needed — placeholder until sourced.

facts.claim: Phoenix Foundation / Phoenix Directive is associated with Terra phoenix-1 chain stewardship following the Terraform Labs collapse, including Protocol-Owned Liquidity management.
